scripts.test: npm run check:manifest && npm run test:solar-sentry:logic && npm run test:crate-circuit:logic && npm run test:reef-raider:logic && npm run test:forge-feint:logic && npm run test:prism-patrol:logic && npm run test:glacier-switch:logic && npm run test:thorn-trail:logic && npm run test:relay-rush:logic && npm run test:lumen-lift:logic && npm run test:quarry-quest:logic && npm run test:neon-heist:logic && npm run test:orbit-rescue:logic && npm run test:tide-courier:logic && npm run test:cavern-blast:logic && npm run test:magnet-forge:logic && npm run test:ember-shift:logic && npm run test:rail-rift:logic && npm run test:glyph-keeper:logic && npm run test:pixel-orchard:logic && npm run test:signal-sprint:logic && npm run test:vault-pusher:logic && npm run test:comet-lantern:logic && npm run test:frostbite-freight:logic && npm run test:moss-mission:logic && npm run test:kiln-caravan:logic && npm run test:dock-drift:logic && npm run test:canopy-scout:logic && npm run test:amber-aisle:logic && npm run test:aurora-breach:logic && npm run test:reef-keeper:logic && npm run test:focus-weave:logic && npm run test:orchid-guard:logic && npm run test:signal-dunes:logic && npm run test:volt-pier:logic && npm run test:decision-compass:logic && npm run test:meeting-weave:logic && npm run test:priority-canvas:logic
scripts.test:solar-sentry:logic: node -e "const mod=require('./src/js/solar-sentry.js'); const result=mod.runSelfCheck(4); if (!result.ok) { console.error(JSON.stringify(result)); process.exit(1); } console.log(JSON.stringify(result));"
